subject: [SO] make SO helm3 compatible
commit_message:
[SO] make SO helm3 compatible

The new componentized SO was creating empty files, which is prohibited
now by helm3.
This patch removes the two templates that are useless now.

Issue-ID: OOM-2562
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I93064cd5a51a6ae27f810853b214ceba320b49ad
